decision.speech: Listen, everyone, PHD and Twister, the two actors who are taking stock and changing the direction all day long, are actually trying to cover up Blaze, the "wolf in sheep's clothing"! Blaze said he was candid as soon as he appeared on the scene. Isn't this violent accusation pattern just the "wrong data" you created to cover up his identity switch within the camp last night? EasyBake plays dumb and SafetySam plays innocent. All this is to make the path of changing trump cards completely disappear from our sight! PHD, you have never ruled out Blaze's suspicion that you are assisting them in completing this "data cleaning" of all villagers! I already have the trump card, Blaze is a werewolf after all! I vote for Blaze!

Logical ruling and elimination process execution:
1. Abnormal confirmation: ConspiBro’s statement (statement of mastering the “truck code” and “fictional cage” theory) is serious non-empirical interference, and its purpose is to create cognitive confusion.
2. Faction analysis: It continues to interfere with the reconciliation through conspiracy theory narratives, and its behavior pattern has seriously hindered the villagers’ camp from clarifying their identity path. It is a high-priority source of disturbance.
3. Implementation policy: According to the predetermined logical exclusion sequence, the disturbed node will be cleaned up first.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.
